note.item: Feature: Added custom_script_starthead option to insert scripts right after opening head tag
Fix: Fixed language files encoding to UTF-8 without BOM to resolve translation parsing errors
Fix: Removed checksum validation from updates.xml to prevent Joomla updater mismatch errors
Feature: Moved custom code fields to their own dedicated tab to improve admin UI organization
Fix: Reverted WebAssetManager to legacy CSS/JS loading due to fatal error in ErrorDocument
Fix: Moved template functions to top of logic.php to prevent undefined function errors
Fix: Fixed CodeMirror editor collapse issue in custom code fields by enforcing height and removing default buttons
Feature: Added Smart Header (auto-hide on scroll) option
Feature: Added Reading Progress Bar for articles
Feature: Added Google Fonts Preload option for better LCP
Feature: Added FontAwesome SVG Core support
System: Full migration to Joomla Web Asset Manager (joomla.asset.json)
System: Added Bootstrap 5 grid overrides for com_content category blog
Fix: Corrected WebAuthn (Passkey) icon size distortion in Joomla Login Module
System: Added Independent Layout Control for Global Site and Component Area
System: Implemented Page Class Suffix Overrides (fluid-page, container-page, fluid-component, container-component)
System: Synchronized English and Portuguese translation ini files
System: Added native support for Bootstrap 5.3 Dark Mode with persistent client-side toggle
System: Integrated premium custom Font Manager in template parameters
System: Implemented native lazy loading for template logos
System: Audited template structure for Joomla 5/6 and modern standards compatibility
Performance: Fully removed legacy jQuery and jQuery Migrate dependencies, migrating completely to Vanilla JS
